titleStmt.title: SII 17.452: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 452. (A.R. No. 421 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This records an order of Vāṇādarāyar, on the representation of Yādavarāyar to the king, assigning the income from levy on textiles (kūṟaittaragu-āyam) from the dēvadāṉa lands to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār.
It mentions Muṉāiyadaraiyar as a signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīH rā[je*]ntiracoḻate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu vāṇātarāyaṉ Olai . Uṭai
yār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār koyil tāṉattār kaṇ
ṭu Ittevar tevatāṉattu tirunāmattukkāṇiya
ṉ kaṇ śvarap perunteruvil kū
ṟaittaraku Āyattukku Iṟuttuvaruṅ kācu nāṭu
kaḷilc cātu mum Urum Iṭum nakara
ṅkaḷ Oṭṭukkoṇṭa kumaṇarāyaṉum Amarakoṉum
taṅkaḷ Oṭṭukkuṭalāka niṉaippiṭṭateṉṟu Ikkācu na
ṟkācu karuvukalatte Oṭukkaveṇumeṉṟu collā
ttār śrīpaṇṭārattukku mutalil varumeṉṟum Ippa
ṭi peṟaveṇumeṉṟum Iyātavarāyar nāyaṉāṟku viṇṇa
ppañ ceykaiyil Ivar Iruntapaṭi Ivarkaḷoṭuṅ
kūṭa nāyaṉār tirumuṉpe keṭṭa Iṭattu Ivvūr naka
raṅkaḷuk kuṭalallātapaṭiyālum tevatāṉamum tirunā
makāṇiyāṉa Ittevaṟku pūcaikkuṭalākak
koṇṭuvarumpaṭiyālum Ikkūṟaittaraku Āyattil muta
lāy varuṅkācu tevar peṟuvārākavum paṇṇi Ippaṭikku
kalveṭṭuvatāka Olai Eḻutik kuṭuppateṉṟum nāyaṉār ti
ruviḷḷamāṉār Ippaṭiye kalveṭṭa paṇṇuvate Ippa
ṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvateṉṟu muṉaiyatarayar māṭṭeṟintuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.452 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
